Validate a tool's schema.yaml against nemo conventions

Source: R/schema_check.R
nemo_schema_check.Rd

Checks schema structure and prints a pass/fail summary: required fields, valid ftype/type values, snake_case tidy names, non-empty versions arrays.

Usage

nemo_schema_check(tool, pkg = "nemo")

Arguments

tool

(character(1))
Tool name, e.g. "tool1".

pkg

(character(1))
Package owning the tool config.

Value

Invisibly returns a tibble of issues (zero rows means all pass).

Examples

nemo_schema_check("tool1", pkg = "nemo")
#> 
#> === nemo_schema_check: nemo::tool1 ===
#> 
#> [PASS] Schema structure
#> 
# invalid schema example: bad ftype, non-snake_case tidy, invalid type
bad_cfg <- list(tables = list(
  mytable = list(
    description = "x", pattern = "\\.tsv$", ftype = "bad_ftype",
    columns = list(list(
      raw = "Col1", tidy = "BadTidy", type = "str",
      description = "col1", versions = list("latest")
    ))
  )
))
